metadata.title: Anchor the Light — a living spiritual path · Ceremony held by Ubbe MacLean & Angelia LaRue, with Brigitte Mars as elder | Coherence Network
metadata.description: A welcome to Anchor the Light — a living spiritual path rooted in direct encounter with the Divine through music, movement, and embodied awareness. The Ceremony is held by Ubbe MacLean and Angelia LaRue as priestess pair; Brigitte Mars is the elder presence deep within the pagan rituals; the wider community draws on Freya Aswynn's runological line. Monthly wellness retreats, pagan ritual gatherings, the Healing from the Tree rune-work book.

hero.eyebrow: A living spiritual path · Enter the Ritual. Become the Experience.
hero.name: Anchor the Light
hero.welcome_md:
*A living spiritual path rooted in direct encounter with the Divine through music, movement, and embodied awareness.* The invitation: *Enter the Ritual. Become the Experience.* The **Ceremony** is held by [Ubbe MacLean](/people/ubbe-maclean) and [Angelia LaRue](/people/angelia-larue) as the **priestess pair** — Ubbe carrying the Asatru / psychotherapy / rune-work line, Angelia carrying the crystology / Reiki / Reverend line. [Brigitte Mars](/people/brigitte-mars) is the **elder presence** deep within the pagan rituals — Boulder herbalist, Naropa professor, 60+ years with plant medicine, 50+ years holding ceremonial space. The wider community also draws on the runologist **Freya Aswynn** (author of *Leaves of Yggdrasil*).

*A trans-tradition spiritual community — Norse Asatru, Reiki lineage, clinical psychotherapy, herbal medicine, qi gong, sound healing, dance — all held inside one ritual frame, without flattening any of them.*

facts.label: Elder presence (pagan rituals)
facts.value_md: [Brigitte Mars](/people/brigitte-mars) — Boulder herbalist, Naropa professor; 60+ years with plant medicine, 50+ years holding ceremonial space

facts.label: Wider community
facts.value_md: Runologist Freya Aswynn (author of Leaves of Yggdrasil) — the broader rune-line the ritual frame draws on.

facts.label: Monthly wellness retreats
facts.value_md: Qi Gong · mindfulness meditation · acupuncture · sound bathing · biofeedback · IV therapy · Reiki · energy healing & protection · forest bathing · plant medicines · life-enhancement skill building · fully organic meals · visionary art · dance — woven into one container

facts.label: Services held
facts.value_md: Life Enhancement Coaching · Mindfulness-Based Stress Reduction · Couples & Relationship Coaching · Reiki · Equine Healing Sessions · Personal Clearings · Rune Reading · Fitness Training

facts.label: Published
facts.value_md: Ubbe MacLean's rune-healing book *Healing From the Tree: Using Runes for Emotional, Physical & Soul Healing*. [More](https://anchorthelight.org/healing-from-the-tree-using-runes-for-emotional-physical-soul-healing/)

note_from_body.body_md: A working church and retreat community with its own ongoing tending. This page recognises its role in this body's wider field as a trans-tradition working example, not affiliation.

articles.body_md:
- A working example of *trans-tradition spiritual community* — Norse heathen Asatru, Reiki lineage, clinical psychotherapy, herbal medicine, qi gong, sound healing, dance, all held inside one ritual frame without flattening any of them into the others. Pairs with [lc-voice-over-intentions](/vision/lc-voice-over-intentions) (each tradition keeps its own voice) and [lc-sovereignty-within-oneness](/vision/lc-sovereignty-within-oneness) (many sovereign lineages, one ritual organism).
- Resonant with [Brahma Vihara Arama](/people/brahma-vihara-arama) (where [Vasudev Baba](/people/vasudev-baba) and Prof Jem Bendell hold bhakti-in-Buddhist-silence retreats) and [Wisdom Soup](/people/wisdom-soup) (Anne Tucker's spiritual-seekers community) — parallel held-spaces in this body's wider lineage map.
- [Brigitte Mars](/people/brigitte-mars) 's herbal lineage and Freya Aswynn's runological lineage thread back to long traditions; the wider field they hold together is broader than any one of them.
- The **priestess pair** shape itself — [Ubbe MacLean](/people/ubbe-maclean) and [Angelia LaRue](/people/angelia-larue) as masculine-feminine ceremonial counterparts — pairs with [lc-sovereignty-within-oneness](/vision/lc-sovereignty-within-oneness): two sovereign lineages, one ritual organism.
articles.heading: What Anchor the Light has given the Coherence Network

en.footer_md:
**Priestess pair:** [Ubbe MacLean](/people/ubbe-maclean) · [Angelia LaRue](/people/angelia-larue) — elder presence [Brigitte Mars](/people/brigitte-mars) — wider community draws on runologist Freya Aswynn.

**Public anchors:** [anchorthelight.org](https://anchorthelight.org/) · [the Church](https://anchorthelight.org/anchor-the-light/) · [Retreats](https://anchorthelight.org/anchor-the-light-wellness-retreats/) · [Facebook](https://www.facebook.com/anchorthelight9)
